location: Starting equipment for the Warrior class. Also sold by the Nomadic Merchant camped in Mistwood, east Limgrave, near Fort Haight, for 600 Runes.
tactics: The merchant sits along the road north of the Fort Haight West grace — easy to pick up alongside other early Mistwood business, such as starting the Bloodhound's Fang quest chain.
It has no passive effect, so treat it as filler until you find a shield with a bonus that matters for your build.
lore: A small wooden roundshield reinforced with metal rivets, its central emblem meant to represent both blade and tree together.

builds.name: Generic Strength starter shield
builds.why: Cheap 8 Strength requirement and solid baseline negation make it a fine no-frills block option in the opening hours.
